mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, businessNo, tel, representative FROM TB_COMPANY ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT id, name, address, businessNo, tel, representative FROM TB_COMPANY WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMPANY (name, address, businessNo, tel, representative) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{businessNo}, #{tel}, #{representative})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_COMPANY SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, businessNo = #{businessNo}, tel = #{tel}, representative = #{representative} WHERE id = #{id}
